candidate_definitions.text: NOTE: Most of the contents of this repository have been migrated to the new devcontainers GitHub org (https://github.com/devcontainers). See https://github.com/devcontainers/template-starter and https://github.com/devcontainers/feature-starter for information on creating your own!

**IMPORTANT NOTE: Dev containers have a new, expanded home in the [dev containers GitHub org](https://github.com/devcontainers)! We're so excited to connect with you there. To learn more, you can check out our [migration announcement](https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-dev-cont…
Public feedback discussions for: GitHub Mobile, GitHub Discussions, GitHub Codespaces, GitHub Sponsors, GitHub Issues and more!
In this repository, you will find categories for various product areas. Feel free to share feedback, discuss topics with other community members, or ask questions.
